questions.question: Explain the difference between a rule-based system and a connectionist system. Provide an example of each type of system.
questions.hint: Focus on the underlying approaches and provide specific examples

questions.question: What is the primary function of a knowledge base in an expert system? Provide an example of a knowledge base and explain how it is used in an expert system.
questions.hint: Focus on the role of the knowledge base in the expert system

questions.question: Describe the concept of forward and backward chaining in expert systems. Provide an example of how forward chaining is used to deduce conclusions from a set of rules.
questions.hint: Focus on the process of deducing conclusions from a set of rules
